checks.name: upload_manifest_match
checks.evidence: artifact_upload_manifest.csv records the upload archive and checksum.
checks.action: Use the manifest as upload evidence.

checks.name: metadata_fields
checks.evidence: Zenodo metadata template has required fields.
checks.action: Copy fields into Zenodo after replacing placeholders.

checks.name: publication_placeholders
checks.evidence: Placeholders remain: TO_BE_FILLED, TO_BE_FILLED_AFTER_ANONYMOUS_REVIEW, TO_BE_FILLED_PUBLIC_REPOSITORY_URL, TO_BE_FILLED_PAPER_URL_OR_DOI
checks.action: Replace these only after real public author/repository/paper metadata exists.

checks.name: claim_boundary_notes
checks.evidence: Metadata notes include required non-claim boundaries.
checks.action: Keep these boundaries in the archive notes.

checks.name: metadata_files_copied
checks.evidence: Deposit packet contains copied metadata templates.
checks.action: Use the copies in the deposit packet.

checks.name: post_publication_update_command
checks.evidence: Post-publication metadata update command is documented.
checks.action: Run it after DOI/public URL exist.

checks.name: copy_fields_boundary
checks.evidence: Zenodo/GitHub copy-field helpers include claim-boundary text.
checks.action: Use these files while filling release portals.

checks.name: doi_public_url_boundary
checks.evidence: DOI/public URL are correctly recorded as not yet minted/published.
checks.action: Do not claim public availability until real values exist.

claim_boundary: Preflight readiness only. Passing this check does not mint a DOI, publish a public repository, or establish artifact availability.
